meta_example:
Our friends and neighbors who live in and around #CurtisBay suffer from high levels of coal dust pollution blown from uncovered railcars and struggle to breathe clean air, which results in respiratory illnesses.
 
That is why I sent a letter to the #EPA questioning #EPA Administrator Michael Regan on this issue. I participated in a congressional hearing in support of this letter and a petition to cover these cars transporting coal into #Baltimore.
 
Thank you, @[100063476599487:2048:Councilwoman Phylicia Porter], for working with the @[100064552344405:2048:SB7] Coalition and other community groups to keep this issue alive. We cannot idly sit by and let this grave case of environmental injustice continue unabated.
 
#EnvironmentalJustice #Environment #SavethePlanet #ClimateJustice #Climate #CleanWater #Baltimore #SouthBaltimore
